analyses.title: Cefazolin for Methicillin-Susceptible Bacteremia.
analyses.oneLineSummary: In patients with methicillin-susceptible bacteremia, cefazolin was noninferior to antistaphylococcal penicillins for 90-day mortality and significantly reduced the risk of acute kidney injury.
analyses.oneLineSummary_ko: 메티실린 감수성 균혈증 환자에서 세파졸린은 90일 사망률 측면에서 항스타필로코쿠스 페니실린 대비 비열등하였으며 급성 신손상 위험을 유의하게 줄였습니다.
analyses.whyItMatters: The choice between cefazolin and antistaphylococcal penicillins (flucloxacillin/cloxacillin) for MSSA bacteremia has been highly debated, primarily due to concerns about the high-inoculum effect with cefazolin and the higher risk of acute kidney injury with penicillins. This randomized trial provides high-quality clinical evidence favoring cefazolin as a safer and highly effective first-line therapy.
analyses.whyItMatters_ko: MSSA 균혈증 치료에 있어 세파졸린과 항스타필로코쿠스 페니실린(플루클록사실린/클록사실린) 간의 선택은 세파졸린의 고균량 효과 우려와 페니실린의 높은 급성 신손상 위험 때문에 오랜 논쟁거리였습니다. 본 무작위 배정 임상시험은 세파졸린이 더 안전하고 매우 효과적인 1차 치료제임을 지지하는 고품질의 임상적 근거를 제공합니다.
analyses.clinicalQuestion: Is cefazolin noninferior to antistaphylococcal penicillins for 90-day mortality, and does it reduce the incidence of acute kidney injury in adult patients with methicillin-susceptible bacteremia?
analyses.clinicalQuestion_ko: 메티실린 감수성 균혈증 성인 환자에서 세파졸린은 90일 사망률 측면에서 항스타필로코쿠스 페니실린 대비 비열등하며, 급성 신손상 발생을 줄입니까?

pico.population: Adult patients with penicillin-resistant, methicillin-susceptible bacteremia
pico.outcome: 90-day all-cause mortality and 14-day acute kidney injury

pico_ko.population: 페니실린 내성, 메티실린 감수성 균혈증이 있는 성인 환자
pico_ko.outcome: 90일 모든 원인으로 인한 사망 및 14일 이내 급성 신손상

detailedPico.population: Adult patients with penicillin-resistant, methicillin-susceptible Staphylococcus aureus bacteremia
detailedPico.population_ko: 페니실린 내성, 메티실린 감수성 황색포도상구균(MSSA) 균혈증 성인 환자
detailedPico.countrySetting: International, multicenter Bayesian adaptive platform trial (SNAP trial)
detailedPico.countrySetting_ko: 다국가, 다기관 베이지안 적응형 플랫폼 임상시험 (SNAP 임상시험)
detailedPico.comparator_ko: 정맥 주사용 항스타필로코쿠스 페니실린 (플루클록사실린 또는 클록사실린)

outcomes.label: Primary Outcome
outcomes.outcome: Death from any cause within 90 days after enrollment
outcomes.outcome_ko: 등록 후 90일 이내 모든 원인으로 인한 사망
outcomes.result: 15.0% (97/645 patients) in the cefazolin group vs 17.0% (109/642 patients) in the antistaphylococcal-penicillin group
outcomes.result_ko: 세파졸린 군 15.0% (97/645명) 대 항스타필로코쿠스 페니실린 군 17.0% (109/642명)
outcomes.statistics: Adjusted odds ratio (aOR), 0.81; 95% credible interval (CrI), 0.59 to 1.12; probability of noninferiority, 99.2%; probability of superiority, 89.8%
outcomes.interpretation: Cefazolin met the prespecified criterion for noninferiority to antistaphylococcal penicillins (aOR <1.2, reflecting <2.5% absolute difference). There was also a high probability of superiority.
outcomes.interpretation_ko: 세파졸린은 항스타필로코쿠스 페니실린 대비 사전 정의된 비열등성 기준(aOR <1.2, 절대 차이 약 <2.5%포인트에 해당)을 충족하였습니다. 또한 우월성을 보일 확률도 높았습니다.

outcomes.label: Secondary Safety Outcome
outcomes.outcome: Development of acute kidney injury (AKI) within 14 days
outcomes.result: 13.9% (92/660 patients) in the cefazolin group vs 19.6% (127/648 patients) in the antistaphylococcal-penicillin group
outcomes.result_ko: 세파졸린 군 13.9% (92/660명) 대 항스타필로코쿠스 페니실린 군 19.6% (127/648명)
outcomes.statistics: Adjusted odds ratio (aOR), 0.67; 95% credible interval (CrI), 0.50 to 0.89; probability of superiority, 99.7%
outcomes.interpretation: Cefazolin was superior to antistaphylococcal penicillins, significantly reducing the occurrence of acute kidney injury.
outcomes.interpretation_ko: 세파졸린은 항스타필로코쿠스 페니실린 대비 우월하여 급성 신손상 발생률을 유의하게 낮췄습니다.

keyFindings: Cefazolin demonstrated noninferiority for 90-day mortality compared to flucloxacillin or cloxacillin (15.0% vs. 17.0%, aOR 0.81, 95% CrI 0.59 to 1.12; posterior probability of noninferiority 99.2%).

Cefazolin was associated with a clinically significant lower risk of acute kidney injury within 14 days than the penicillins (13.9% vs. 19.6%, aOR 0.67, 95% CrI 0.50 to 0.89; posterior probability of superiority 99.7%).
keyFindings_ko: 세파졸린은 플루클록사실린 또는 클록사실린 대비 90일 사망률에서 비열등성을 입증했습니다 (15.0% 대 17.0%, 보정 오즈비 0.81, 95% 신용구간 0.59~1.12, 비열등성 후험 확률 99.2%).
세파졸린은 페니실린 제제에 비해 14일 이내 급성 신손상 위험을 임상적으로 유의미하게 낮췄습니다 (13.9% 대 19.6%, 보정 오즈비 0.67, 95% 신용구간 0.50~0.89, 우월성 후험 확률 99.7%).
analyses.conclusion: Cefazolin is noninferior to antistaphylococcal penicillins (flucloxacillin/cloxacillin) for the treatment of methicillin-susceptible bacteremia, while providing a significantly safer renal profile with lower rates of acute kidney injury.
analyses.conclusion_ko: 메티실린 감수성 균혈증 치료에 있어 세파졸린은 항스타필로코쿠스 페니실린(플루클록사실린/클록사실린) 대비 90일 사망률 측면에서 비열등하며, 급성 신손상 빈도를 유의하게 낮추어 현저히 우수한 신장 안전성 프로파일을 보입니다.
analyses.clinicalTakeaway: In adult patients with MSSA bacteremia, cefazolin should be the preferred first-line parenteral therapy over antistaphylococcal penicillins like flucloxacillin or cloxacillin. It offers identical efficacy with a substantially lower risk of nephrotoxicity, clarifying long-standing clinical practice dilemmas.
analyses.clinicalTakeaway_ko: MSSA 균혈증이 있는 성인 환자에서 세파졸린은 플루클록사실린이나 클록사실린과 같은 항스타필로코쿠스 페니실린보다 선호되는 1차 정맥 투여 치료제여야 합니다. 신독성 위험이 실질적으로 훨씬 낮으면서도 동등한 효능을 제공하므로 오랜 임상적 고민을 해결해 줍니다.
analyses.limitations: The trial was open-label, which could influence secondary clinician behaviors or discharge decisions. Additionally, the brief abstract details do not specify the prevalence or outcome in patients with high-inoculum infections like endocarditis.
analyses.limitations_ko: 본 임상시험은 공개라벨(open-label) 디자인으로 진행되어 의료진의 세부적인 관리나 퇴원 결정 등에 영향을 미쳤을 수 있습니다. 또한 초록의 정보만으로는 심내막염과 같은 고균량 감염(high-inoculum infection) 환자에서의 비율이나 결과가 구별되어 제시되지 않았습니다.
analyses.edIcuApplicability: Highly applicable. Emergency and ICU physicians routinely initiate, continue, or transition empiric MRSA cover to targeted MSSA cover. Utilizing cefazolin instead of flucloxacillin/cloxacillin simplifies administration, is widely available globally, and significantly spares renal function in critically ill patients.
analyses.edIcuApplicability_ko: 매우 적용 가능성이 높습니다. 응급실 및 중환자실 의료진은 흔히 MSSA 표적 치료를 시작하거나 기존 치료를 전환합니다. 플루클록사실린/클록사실린 대신 세파졸린을 투여하는 것은 약제 공급이 수월하고 투약이 용이할 뿐만 아니라, 중증 환자의 신기능을 보존하는 데 큰 장점을 제공합니다.
analysisNotes: Noninferiority and superiority evaluated with hierarchical Bayesian logistic-regression modeling.

paper.title: Cefazolin for Methicillin-Susceptible Bacteremia.
paper.abstract:
BACKGROUND: bacteremia is associated with high mortality. Whether cefazolin or an antistaphylococcal penicillin should be preferred for the treatment of methicillin-susceptible bacteremia is unclear.
METHODS: In an ongoing international Bayesian adaptive platform trial, we conducted an open-label, randomized comparison of cefazolin with an antistaphylococcal penicillin (flucloxacillin or cloxacillin) in adult patients with penicillin-resistant, methicillin-susceptible bacteremia. The primary outcome, which was evaluated with a hierarchical Bayesian logistic-regression model, was death from any cause within 90 days after enrollment in the platform. We assessed the posterior probability of the noninferiority of cefazolin to flucloxacillin or cloxacillin (with the criterion for noninferiority prespecified as an adjusted odds ratio of <1.2, which approximates an absolute difference in mortality of <2.5 percentage points if mortality in the antistaphylococcal-penicillin group is 15%), as well as the posterior probability of superiority (with the criterion of an adjusted odds ratio of <1.0). Secondary safety outcomes included the development of acute kidney injury within 14 days.
RESULTS: This domain of the ongoing trial was conducted between February 17, 2022, and August 7, 2024, by which time the criterion for noninferiority had been met. Mortality at 90 days among adults who could be evaluated was 15.0% (97 deaths among 645 patients) in the cefazolin group and 17.0% (109 deaths among 642 patients) in the antistaphylococcal-penicillin group (adjusted odds ratio, 0.81; 95% credible interval, 0.59 to 1.12; probability of noninferiority, 99.2%; probability of superiority, 89.8%). Acute kidney injury occurred in 92 of 660 patients (13.9%) in the cefazolin group, as compared with 127 of 648 (19.6%) in the antistaphylococcal-penicillin group (adjusted odds ratio, 0.67; 95% credible interval, 0.50 to 0.89; probability of superiority, 99.7%).
CONCLUSIONS: In patients with methicillin-susceptible bacteremia, cefazolin was noninferior to flucloxacillin or cloxacillin with respect to 90-day mortality and was associated with a lower incidence of acute kidney injury. (Funded by the National Health and Medical Research Council and others; SNAP ClinicalTrials.gov number, NCT05137119.).
paper.journal: The New England journal of medicine

reasons: journal boost: The New England journal of medicine

contextSource.reason: No PMCID available for open full-text fetch

selected.rationale_ko: 메티실린 감수성 황색포도상구균(MSSA) 균혈증 환자에서 세파졸린과 항스타필로코코스 페니실린의 효능 및 안전성을 비교한 NEJM 게재 다기관 무작위 대조 시험(RCT)입니다. 응급실 및 중환자실에서 흔히 접하는 치명적인 감염증의 표준 항생제 선택에 직접적이고 중대한 임상적 근거를 제공하는 중대한 연구입니다.

notes_ko: NEJM에 게재된 MSSA 균혈증에 대한 세파졸린 대 페니실린 비교 임상시험은 임상 현장에서의 항생제 선택을 유도하는 최상위 수준의 증거를 제공하므로 오늘의 가장 중요한 논문으로 선정하였습니다.
